specific_mechanism: Parton distribution functions partition a hadron's momentum among quarks and gluons via DGLAP evolution; the partition is scale-dependent and sums to total momentum=1
llm_application: LLM context-budget allocation across attention heads as DGLAP-style scale-dependent partitioning: each head's effective compute budget evolves with input length, summing to total layer budget=1.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes particle-physics spectral-allocation mapping as proposed.
